name: VTIL_EnableNameManagement
title: VTIL_EnableNameManagement
description: This function activates the name management of a node. Not until the name management is activated another node can change the device name of this node by sending a name management message.
return: 0 on success or VT IL Error Code

example.code:
//allow every component to be changed except arbitrary address capable flag
VTIL_EnableNameManagement(1, 0xFE);
